title:
PROMPT 037: Globe Network вЂ” Global Reach
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 5.0s | LOOP: Yes
SVG: Globe (28 paths: outer circle, 3 longitude arc lines, 3 latitude arc lines, equator line, continent simplified blobs Г—5 (Africa, Americas, Europe/Asia, Australia, small shapes), 4 location pin dots at key cities, 4 connection arc lines between pins, 2 orbit ring ellipses around globe) вЂ” globe centered 960Г—540px, 360px diameter

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #030712 (near black)
Globe circle fill: #0B1120 (very dark blue)
Globe circle stroke: #1E40AF (blue, 2px)
Grid lines stroke: #1E40AF (blue, 1px, 30% opacity)
Continent fills: #1D4ED8 (blue, 60% opacity)
Location pins fill: #60A5FA (bright blue, 12px circles)
Connection arc strokes: #60A5FA (blue, 1.5px, dashed, animated)
Orbit ring 1 stroke: #3B82F6 (blue, 1.5px, ellipse, 30В° tilt)
Orbit ring 2 stroke: #2563EB (slightly darker blue, 1px, ellipse, -30В° tilt)
Small satellite dot: #FBBF24 (gold, 8px, travels orbit ring 1)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Globe centered. Orbit rings around it. Location pins on continent areas. Connection arcs between pins.
Satellite dot orbits ring 1.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (5.0s loopable):
0вЂ“0.5s: Globe circle scales 0в†’1.0 (ease-out spring). Grid lines fade in (opacity 0в†’0.3, ease-out).
0.5вЂ“1.0s: Continent blobs appear (each scales 0в†’1.0, 0.08s stagger, spring).
1.0вЂ“1.4s: Globe rotates slowly (continuous Y-axis rotation simulation: grid lines and continents drift right at ~2px/s, ease-in). Orbit rings draw in (dashoffset 100%в†’0%, ease-out, stagger 0.2s).
1.4вЂ“1.8s: Location pins appear (scale 0в†’1.0, spring, staggered 0.15s each). Each pin has ripple ring (circle stroke, opacity 0.6в†’0, radius 12в†’40px, ease-out).
1.8вЂ“3.5s (continuous): Connection arc dashes animate along arcs (dashoffset cycles continuously, 1.2s per arc, linear, each arc staggered 0.3s). Satellite dot travels orbit ring (360В° per 3s, linear, loops).
3.5вЂ“4.5s: All elements hold. Globe slow rotation continues. Subtle glow pulse on globe edge (stroke blur 0в†’12pxв†’0, ease-in-out, 1.0s cycle).
4.5вЂ“5.0s: Loop reset preparation.

EASING CURVES:
- Entry: spring / ease-out
- Arc dash: linear
- Rotation sim: linear
- Glow: ease-in-out
